rationale.regulatory-compliance: AML/KYC/ECOA-aligned ethical-risk quantification grounded in IEEE 7000
rationale.framework: five-layer architecture designed for CI/CD pipeline integration
rationale.design-only: Colab demo fabricates EG/ADS/bias outputs with random stand-ins
rationale.metrics: defines PRS/BPI/EG/ADS/ERS; measurands: ip-plagiarism, bias, comprehensibility, over-reliance, compliance
rationale.assistive: GPT suggestions accepted piecewise; ADS tracks acceptance moment
rationale.risk-ip: defines PRS metric for plagiarism/IP risk
rationale.risk-bias: defines BPI metric for bias in generated code
rationale.risk-quality: defines EG metric for code comprehensibility
rationale.risk-overreliance: defines ADS metric for unreviewed AI-code acceptance
